title: Noteblock Backport
description: Bring instruments from latest game versions to 1.12.2
body:
# Noteblock Backport
Bring back instruments from later versions of minecraft into 1.12.2


## Instruments Re-added
The following instruments have been backported

- Iron Xylophone - Iron Block
- Cow Bell - Soul Sand
- Didgeridoo - Pumpkin
- "Bit" Square Wave - Emerald Block
- Banjo - Hay Bale
- "Pling" Electric Piano - Glowstone
